channel.title: Guides on Mobile A11y
channel.description: Recent content in Guides on Mobile A11y

item.title: XCUITests for accessibility
item.description: For a while now I’ve been looking at possibilities for automated accessibility testing on iOS. Unfortunately, I’ve not found any option so far that I’m happy with. I am a big fan of Apple’s XCUI Test framework. Although it has its limitations, I believe there’s scope for creating valid accessibility tests using this framework. Over the last few months I’ve been trying things out, and here’s what I’ve come up with.
